item.title: Medline Industries, LP: Medline Convenience Kits: 1) KIT SURG ONC EXCISION BREAST, Model Number:DYKMBNDL84A; 2) KIT SURG ONC EXPLORATORY LAP, Model Number:DYKMBNDL8 Recall
item.product: Medline Convenience Kits: 1) KIT SURG ONC EXCISION BREAST, Model Number:DYKMBNDL84A; 2) KIT SURG ONC EXPLORATORY LAP, Model Number:DYKMBNDL8
item.summary: Medline has identified issues related to calibration of the equipment used to sterilize and package the devices. All products were exposed to the validated sterilization and packaging cycles; however, the identified calibration issues have the potential to impact the sterility assurance level (SAL) of the Recalled Products. item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
